label: Computational phase · complete
title: Ultra-Mini STRC (1075–1775) cleared every compute gate. Next gate is wet-lab.
desc: Across 23 AlphaFold3 jobs we converged on the aggressive C-terminal-only truncation as the clinical candidate. Fold, TMEM145 interface, homodimer geometry, CpG-depleted CDS, and an AAV-fitting OHC-exclusive regulatory cassette all check. The hypothesis is now frozen for compute — any further forward motion is physical: order the gBlock, clone the pAAV, run HEK coIP.
gate1_d: Sub-Å RMSD across three truncations; TMEM145 binding pocket unchanged.
gate2_d: Ultra-Mini × TMEM145 full (ipTM 0.43) + GOLD-pruned (0.68) + homodimer (0.28–0.30, 94 % C2).
gate3_d: 0 CpG at 3.65 % CAI cost; B8 (706 bp, Zhao 2025 Neuron) + WPRE3-compact leaves 891 bp spare in ITR-to-ITR. Literature audit closed 2026-04-24 — all clinical-vector blockers resolved.
timestamp: Frozen 2026-04-24 · version Ultra-Mini v1 · supersedes Mini-STRC 700-1775 as clinical candidate · tier S (lit audit: fixed)
